55007.title: The Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer
55007.description: Anchor Wolf Blitzer invites CNN correspondents, analysts and guests for timely coverage of the day's news events. Patterned after the concept of the White House Situation Room, the Monday-Saturday show is a discussion forum often with opposing sides debating current national affairs.

55008.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
55008.description: It's Erin Burnett's turn to step out front and try to maintain a viable viewer presence for CNN in the weekday news arena. But the former CNBC anchor won't worry about ratings for her hourlong general news program, comparing that burden to "death." Instead, she'll concern herself with translating world events into relevant information for viewers, paying close attention to such topics as the Middle East and women's issues. "I want people to say that our show is smart. I want our show to be authentic", Burnett says in a promo. "I want our show to have courage". Left unsaid, of course, is that she wants her show to have a big audience, too.

55009.title: Anderson Cooper 360
55009.description: Cooper brings his prickly but often witty perspective to current events and personalities in the news. He is joined by a series of guests that frequently include political and legal analysts.

55011.title: Don Lemon Tonight
55011.description: Don Lemon presents the biggest stories, newsmakers, and spirited conversations of the day.

55012.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
55012.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

55013.title: World Sport
55013.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

55014.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
55014.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

55015.title: CNN Newsroom with Robyn Curnow
55015.description: Live from Atlanta, Robyn Curnow presents the latest news and global events.

55016.title: World Sport
55016.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

55017.title: CNN Newsroom with Rosemary Church
55017.description: Live from Atlanta, Rosemary Church brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

55018.title: CNN Newsroom with Isa Soares
55018.description: Daily headlines and breaking stories live from CNN headquarters in Atlanta. The rotating cast of anchors and contributors include Carol Costello, Kyra Phillips, Suzanne Malveaux, Brooke Baldwin, Don Lemon, Randi Kaye and Fredricka Whitfield.

55019.title: Early Start
55019.description: An early start with news from Ashleigh Banfield and Zoraida Sambolin.

55020.title: New Day
55020.description: John Berman and Brianna Keilar report the latest news and top stories.

55022.title: Connect the World
55022.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

55023.title: Inside Politics
55023.description: With veteran Washington correspondent John King in the anchor chair, `Inside Politics' focuses on the top political stories of the day with a rotating round table of top sourced reporters from CNN and from other media outlets. The half-hour program gives viewers an inside look at the stories driving Washington, directly from reporters on the ground. Prior to its revival in 2014, `Inside Politics' was first headed by Judy Woodruff, and it aired for more than 20 years on CNN before its cancellation in 2005.

55024.title: African Voices Changemakers
55024.description: Following a Kenyan media producer who is on a mission to make the superhero genre more inclusive. Highlighting the visionary behind South Africa's first superhero comic book series.

55025.title: Amanpour
55025.description: Peabody Award-winning journalist Christiane Amanpour, CNN's chief international correspondent, hosts this half-hour weeknight interview program, with each episode focusing on a newsworthy topic and featuring guests, from global leaders to heads of state and cultural icons, who are comfortable challenging conventional wisdom.

55026.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
55026.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

55027.title: Quest Means Business
55027.description: Richard Quest and a team of correspondents analyze the facts and figures from the business world to help people earn money and spend it wisely.

55028.title: Africa Avant Garde
55028.description: A look at some of the most influential living modern and contemporary artists as well as a visit to a museum which celebrates the best of contemporary African art.

55029.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
55029.description: CNN's chief Washington correspondent, Jake Tapper, hosts this hour-long weekday afternoon program, which covers all the day's top stories from around the country and the world, headlines that span politics, money, sports and popular culture. `The Lead' works to ensure that viewers are caught up on the stories that matter, often highlighting news that may have been overlooked. Prior to joining CNN, Tapper served as senior White House correspondent at ABC News.

55030.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
55030.description: Jake Tapper covers all the day's top stories around the country and the globe, from politics to money, sports to popular culture.
